stereotype: «Client» — read-only export endpoint · imports no Temporal
volatility: CustomerInteractionChannel (web) and Transport (HTTP/JSON): a read-only project-state download surface for operator tooling and construction agents.

outbound.name: projectDesignManager
outbound.how: sync in-process via narrow Manager-entry port

ops.note: Returns the project's committed state as a JSON download. HTTP: GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/export. Routes to projectDesignManager.GetProject; returns the raw project.json bytes as application/json with Content-Disposition: attachment. Read-only; no mutation.

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: Method layer-typed error; fwmgr.NotFound if project unknown

errorModel: fwmgr.Error (NotFound on unknown project; Transient on git read failure)

revisions.summary: First construction dogfood contract. Single read op exposing project state as a JSON download. Follows webClient.json Client-contract conventions. ComponentID=C-PE (activity-name-as-identity per hydrateConstructionActivity).
